name: promethist-platform
description: Operate the Promethist Platform from Claude: tenants, projects, agents, evaluations, knowledge, multimodal, integrations, analytics.
long_description: Local MCP server that wraps the Promethist Platform REST API and authenticates as the logged-in user via browser login. Provides ~83 tools plus on-demand guides for building and operating Promethist voice agents.

tools.name: list_tenants
tools.description: List all tenants (accounts) the user can access, with their projects.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List the agents in a project.

tools.name: create_agent
tools.description: Create a Promethist agent in a project.

tools.name: get_guide
tools.description: Load detailed Promethist authoring/operation guidance on demand.
